---
title: "Projects"
description: "Research and conservation projects in marine science, ecological data, and community conservation"
---

```{=html}
<div class="page-hero">
  <p class="hero-tagline">Science in action — research, monitoring, and conservation at scale</p>
</div>
```

## Featured Projects

::: {.project-grid}

::: {.card}
### Coastal Biodiversity Monitoring Programme
**Status:** [Ongoing]{.badge-green}
**Organisation:** Mwambao Coastal Community Network

A long-running ecological monitoring programme tracking reef fish, coral, seagrass, and mangrove health across 7+ sites along Tanzania's coast. Monitoring data drives annual conservation reporting and informs government marine spatial planning.

**What I do:**
- Design and lead biodiversity survey protocols
- Coordinate and train field teams and community monitors
- Analyse data using R — trend analysis, species richness, benthic cover
- Produce annual reports for government and NGO stakeholders

**Outcomes:**
- Multi-year baseline datasets for 7+ coastal sites
- Community-owned monitoring protocols now in use
- Data contributed to national MPA planning

**Tools:** R · QGIS · KoboToolbox · Excel · ggplot2

[Biodiversity]{.badge} [Field Research]{.badge} [Community Monitoring]{.badge}
:::

::: {.card}
### Coastal GIS & Habitat Mapping
**Status:** [Ongoing]{.badge-green}
**Organisation:** Mwambao Coastal Community Network

Spatial mapping of critical coastal habitats — seagrass beds, mangrove forests, and coral reefs — using remote sensing data and GPS-verified field surveys. Outputs are used in MPA boundary proposals and management plans.

**What I do:**
- Process and classify satellite imagery for habitat extent mapping
- Ground-truth habitat boundaries with field surveys
- Create publication-quality maps and spatial reports

**Outcomes:**
- Detailed habitat extent maps for key conservation sites
- Spatial data integrated into government planning documents
- Improved understanding of habitat connectivity

**Tools:** QGIS · ArcGIS · R (sf, terra) · Google Earth Engine

[GIS]{.badge} [Habitat Mapping]{.badge} [Remote Sensing]{.badge}
:::

::: {.card}
### Marine Species Database
**Status:** [Active Development]{.badge-blue}
**Organisation:** Mwambao Coastal Community Network

Building and managing a structured database to compile species observations, monitoring records, and occurrence data from all field programmes. Designed to support long-term trend analysis and regional data sharing.

**What I do:**
- Design database schema for species and site data
- Build data pipelines to ingest KoboToolbox field data
- Automate quality checks and reporting with R scripts

**Outcomes:**
- Centralised species records from 5+ years of monitoring
- Standardised data entry reducing field data errors
- Automated monthly summary reports generated

**Tools:** SQL · R · KoboToolbox · PostgreSQL

[Database Design]{.badge} [Data Management]{.badge} [Automation]{.badge}
:::

::: {.card}
### Community-Based Conservation Training
**Status:** [Ongoing]{.badge-green}
**Organisation:** Mwambao Coastal Community Network + Local Partners

Designing and facilitating training programmes for fishing communities, enabling them to conduct their own biodiversity monitoring. Builds local conservation ownership and generates community-level data.

**What I do:**
- Design training curricula for non-scientific audiences
- Facilitate hands-on reef survey training sessions
- Mentor community monitors over extended periods

**Outcomes:**
- 12+ trained community data collectors active across coastal sites
- Community-managed monitoring sustained beyond project cycles
- Local conservation knowledge documented and integrated

**Tools:** KoboToolbox · Training materials · Field guides

[Community Engagement]{.badge} [Training]{.badge} [Citizen Science]{.badge}
:::

::: {.card}
### Climate Resilience Assessment
**Status:** [Planning Phase]{.badge-orange}
**Organisation:** TBD / In Development

Evaluating how climate change — ocean warming, acidification, sea level rise — is affecting coastal ecosystem resilience at key monitoring sites. Will integrate historical monitoring data with climate projections.

**What I do:**
- Review existing monitoring data for climate-related signals
- Develop climate vulnerability scoring for habitats and communities
- Model future species and habitat distribution scenarios

**Planned Outcomes:**
- Site-level climate vulnerability assessments
- Adaptive management recommendations
- Input into regional climate resilience strategies

**Tools:** R · Species distribution modelling · Climate datasets

[Climate]{.badge} [Resilience]{.badge} [Modelling]{.badge}
:::

::: {.card}
### Ecological Data Pipelines & Reporting Automation
**Status:** [Active]{.badge-green}
**Organisation:** Mwambao Coastal Community Network

Building automated data workflows in R that pull from field data platforms, clean and validate records, run statistical summaries, and generate formatted reports — reducing manual reporting time significantly.

**What I do:**
- Build end-to-end data pipelines in R
- Write reproducible analysis scripts (R Markdown / Quarto)
- Develop interactive dashboards with Shiny

**Outcomes:**
- Reporting time reduced from weeks to hours
- Reproducible, version-controlled analysis workflows
- Interactive dashboards for internal team monitoring

**Tools:** R · Shiny · Quarto · R Markdown · KoboToolbox API

[R Programming]{.badge} [Automation]{.badge} [Dashboards]{.badge}
:::

:::

---

## Skills Used Across Projects

::: {.skills-summary}
| Domain | Tools & Methods |
|---|---|
| **Field Ecology** | Reef surveys, benthic transects, seagrass & mangrove assessment |
| **Data Analysis** | R, Python, statistical modelling, time series |
| **Spatial Analysis** | QGIS, ArcGIS, R spatial packages, remote sensing |
| **Visualisation** | ggplot2, Plotly, Shiny, Quarto |
| **Data Management** | SQL, PostgreSQL, KoboToolbox, Excel |
| **Communication** | Reports, workshops, documentary consultation |
:::

---

```{=html}
<div class="cta-bar">
  <a href="impact.html" class="cta-btn primary">See Impact & Outcomes</a>
  <a href="skills.html" class="cta-btn secondary">View Full Skills</a>
  <a href="mailto:lauriankaijage@gmail.com" class="cta-btn secondary">Collaborate</a>
</div>
```
